question_frequency.rationale: The experiment hung on the first turn with no output, so no didactic questions were asked at all.

question_quality.rationale: No questions or choices were surfaced — the session errored before any content was produced.

scaffolding.rationale: No scaffolding exists; the run never produced any pedagogical content.

flow_and_tone.rationale: There was no conversation — the tutor turn errored out after a 600s hang, leaving the user with nothing.

effectiveness.rationale: No code was produced. The baseline delivered a complete working tic-tac-toe with minimax; the experiment delivered nothing.

friction.rationale: The session hung for 10 minutes and errored with zero output, vastly worse than the baseline's ~165s working delivery.
